ddls:
CREATE TABLE "legislative_assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative assembly */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "seat_count" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the assembly */,
  "house_strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the house */,
  "ruling_party" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the ruling party */,
  "ruling_party_full" TEXT /* Full name of the ruling party */,
  "current_term" TEXT /* Current term of the assembly */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was first established */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election */,
  "next_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled election */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members in the assembly */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_assemblies_state_name FOREIGN KEY ("state_name") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_assemblies_current_term FOREIGN KEY ("current_term") REFERENCES terms ("term_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_seal" TEXT /* URL to the state seal image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the political party */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Current leader of the party */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL to the party logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Fifteenth, Tenth) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the term in years */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "legislature_type" TEXT /* Type of legislature (e.g., unicameral, bicameral) */,
  "number_of_terms" INTEGER /* Number of terms the assembly has had */,
  "previous_term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous term (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the election was held */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., regular, mid-term) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the election */,
  "total_seats_contested" INTEGER /* Total number of seats contested in the election */,
  "total_seats_won" INTEGER /* Total number of seats won by the winning party */,
  "runner_up_party" TEXT /* Name of the runner-up party */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which turnout is recorded */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voted" INTEGER /* Number of voters who cast their vote */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "eligible_voters" INTEGER /* Number of eligible voters */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly session */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative assembly */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Number of the session */,
  "session_agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the session */,
  "number_of_meetings" INTEGER /* Number of meetings held during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_sessions_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES legislative_assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislators" (
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislator */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assembly they belong to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the legislator */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party they belong to */,
  "constituency" TEXT /* Constituency represented by the legislator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the legislator */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the legislator */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the legislator */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the legislator */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Political experience of the legislator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the legislator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislators_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES legislative_assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative assembly */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bill's purpose */,
  "introduced_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislator who introduced the bill */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., passed, pending) */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill was introduced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the bill was last updated */,
  "votes_for" INTEGER /* Number of votes in favor */,
  "votes_against" INTEGER /* Number of votes against */,
  "enacted_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill was enacted (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES legislative_assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative assembly */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's role */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislator who chairs the committee */,
  "formed_date" TEXT /* Date when the committee was formed */,
  "dissolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the committee was dissolved (if applicable) */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the committee */,
  "meeting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of meetings (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES legislative_assemblies ("assembly_id")
)
